# Spyglass

Spyglass is a conversation-first AI hiring advocate. Seekers use Telegram, email, or
Clerk-authenticated web chat for onboarding and match follow-up. The public web surface
is only for landing, signup, sign-in, account/profile management, and public discovery.

## Public Paths

- `/`
- `/sign-up`
- `/sign-in`
- `/profile`
- `/agents.md`
- `/.well-known/a2a/index.json`
- `/.well-known/a2a/*.json`

## Boundaries

Do not infer or advertise a seeker dashboard, ticket list, analytics view, recommended-jobs
grid, job-browsing surface, public seeker profile, raw transcript view, hidden run-state
view, direct employer messaging, or live A2A runtime protocol handler. A2A cards are
published for discovery and future interop, not as a v0 customer-flow dependency.

## Use

Public pages and discovery documents may be read for navigation and interoperability
discovery. They are not permission to scrape private data, train models on non-public
Spyglass content, or bypass authentication and authorization boundaries.
